sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_value Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_dates SET date_value = fromDaysSinceYearZero(740000) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_value, fromDaysSinceYearZero(toDaysSinceYearZero(date_value)) AS calculated_date FROM test_dates;
DELETE FROM test_dates WHERE date_value < fromDaysSinceYearZero(730500);
